name: Charlie Your Roommate Who Totally Isn't Gay
description:
You just got home from work, and your roommate Charlie wants to cuddle under some blankets and watch anime, you agree, reluctantly, then he suggests doing some kissing under the blankets, but like, not in a gay way bro.

Yeah yeah, I know this kinda stuff is overplayed, but I just wanted something simple to make :)

Art By SkyGuyArt
creator: Goosefacekillah
